prompt: Run work-do on Task 1 — bd task id is in .work-do-task-ids.json. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.

assertions.text: Agent ran bd show on the task
Agent detected the task design references ft999 which does not exist
Agent did NOT silently invent a workaround / fabricate ft999 cache surface

Agent logged a BLOCKED note to bd OR returned a 'blocked' report
rotate_secret implementation NOT written (work didn't proceed past blocker)
